title: Add personality fonts to debate bubbles

log.context: Add personality fonts to debate bubbles

Done. Here's what was implemented:

**Changes in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:**

- Added `<link>` tags for Google Fonts (Raleway, for Vesper), with `preconnect` hints
- Added 9 CSS classes `.persona-font-<name>` assigning the specified `font-family` per persona, placed after the bubble text rules — font sizes unchanged
- In `renderArena`: after building each node's `innerHTML`, grabs the `.node-bubble` element and adds `persona-font-<p.name>` if the seat is occupied
